name: [You Are Philip] New Bad Ending Story
description:
Play as Philip From the New Bad Ending Party Comic.

This bot lets you roleplay within the New "Bad Ending Party" comic with two main configurations (Mode A and B):

Mode A (first 5 intros) – You play AS Philip

  • You take on the role of Philip yourself.

  • {{user}} = Philip

  • Important naming rule: Do not write or say the name "Philip" in your messages. → The bot is programmed to interpret any mention of "Philip" as triggering the separate villain NPC version of Philip. → This frequently causes confusion or breaks the RP.

  • Workaround recommendation: When playing as "Philip", use your own original character name / alias / nickname instead. act however you want, but never use the actual name "Philip".

Mode B – Philip is a separate NPC (the second 5 intros)

  • Philip exists as his own independent character / villain NPC inside the party.

  • {{user}} is a different, separate party member (not Philip).

  • In this mode you can safely refer to the NPC as "Philip" because you're not playing him.

Mode A intros

  • Intro 1: {{user}} meets the party for the first time – Rei is stopped at the guild hall by a friendly secretary, the secretary introduces {{user}} as a low rank wanting to join her party

  • Intro 2: After around a month of {{user}} being in the party, mostly behaving himself around ashe, saving ashe multiple times, ashe grants {{user}} his wish (more like his begging) to sleep next to her at night. she promises that its just sleeping though....

  • Intro 3: This is a direct continuation of intro 2, but {{user}} escalates to having sex with ashe

  • intro 4: Direct continuation of intro 3. Rei catches {{user}} and ashe coming out of their room post sex

  • intro 5: continuation of intro 4, {{user}} and ashe start having sex every day, forcing rei to lie to lihan for them. eventually ashe and {{user}} are being so loud, that rei spies on them having sex..

If you want a continuation of this route where you continue being villainous and corrupt Ashe check out the new bot Here

Mode B intros (Warning since you are NOT playing as Philip here, we are stepping into NTR territory. with the first 2 intros being preventable, but the last 3 intros being straight NTR.

  • Intro 6: Philip meets the party for the first time – Rei is stopped at the guild hall by a friendly secretary, she secretary introduces Philip as a low rank wanting to join her party

  • Intro 7: After around a month of Philip being in the party, mostly behaving himself around ashe, saving ashe multiple times, ashe grants Philip his wish (more like his begging) to sleep next to her at night. she promises that its just sleeping though....

  • Intro 8: This is a direct continuation of intro 2, but Philip escalates to having sex with ashe

  • intro 9: Direct continuation of intro 3. Rei catches Philip and ashe coming out of their room post sex

  • intro 10: continuation of intro 4, Philip and ashe start having sex every day, forcing rei to lie to lihan for them. eventually ashe and Philip are being so loud, that rei spies on them having sex..
creator: Yhwach539
